sigWerErrors.reason: 'đi' (go) is inserted, but it does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence, as the main point is losing the card.
'cái' is a classifier in Vietnamese and its insertion does not change the meaning of the sentence.
'muốn hỏi' (want to ask) is replaced by 'câu hỏi' (question), which changes the structure but not the intent of asking when the card will be available.
The question mark is omitted, but this is a punctuation difference and does not affect meaning.
